Container.Name: quefy
Container.Overview: Multi-user YouTube, Spotify, and SoundCloud audio streaming rooms. Host creates a room, share the code — joiners queue songs, host's device plays the audio.
Container.Requires: yt-dlp installed on host or use external proxy

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for cookies and config.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: HTTP port for the web interface.

Config.Name: YT_DLP_COOKIES
Config.Description: Path to Netscape-format cookies file for yt-dlp.

Config.Name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID
Config.Description: Spotify App Client ID (optional, for Spotify support).

Config.Name: SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET
Config.Description: Spotify App Client Secret (optional, for Spotify support).

Config.Name: SPOTIFY_MARKET
Config.Description: Market code for Spotify search (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, optional).
